categories.name: 3PL / Outsourced Fulfillment

companies.name: Flexe
companies.description: On-demand warehousing marketplace. 800+ warehouse operators. Serves Walmart, Staples, Ralph Lauren.

market_dynamics.title: Hidden 3PL Fees
market_dynamics.description: 15-30% shipping markups, storage penalties, receiving fees, offboarding costs ($3,000+ at ShipBob).
market_dynamics.opportunity: Any competitor can win these brands by offering transparent pricing. Co-warehouses sell space; competing 3PLs sell better terms.

market_dynamics.title: Loss of Quality Control
market_dynamics.description: Cross-shipped orders, mixed SKUs, sloppy packing, no FIFO, wrong items. Error rates >2%.
market_dynamics.opportunity: Brands with premium or custom products are the most sensitive. They want hands-on control over their fulfillment process.

market_dynamics.title: 3PL Exit Nightmares
market_dynamics.description: ShipMonk exit takes 6+ months with continued billing. ShipBob offboarding >$3,000. Inventory held hostage.
market_dynamics.opportunity: Highest-intent signals. Brands in exit mode need a solution immediately and will sign fast.

market_dynamics.title: Outgrowing Home / Garage
market_dynamics.description: Shipping software users hitting volume where home fulfillment is unsustainable. 50+ orders/day from a garage.
market_dynamics.opportunity: The primary growth funnel for co-warehousing. Also a funnel for 3PLs who can offer outsourced fulfillment.

market_dynamics.title: Amazon FBA Prep Crisis
market_dynamics.direction: FBA-reliant sellers → Need prep space or services
market_dynamics.description: Amazon ended all US prep/labeling services Jan 1, 2026. 82% of Amazon sellers use FBA.
market_dynamics.opportunity: Massive, time-sensitive. Every seller who relied on Amazon's prep needs either outsourced prep or their own workspace.

market_dynamics.title: Custom / Kitted Products
market_dynamics.description: Subscription boxes, custom-assembled products, special handling. 3PLs charge premium for kitting.
market_dynamics.opportunity: These brands need physical space for assembly. Co-warehouses and makerspaces can serve them.

market_dynamics.title: Scaling Past 3PL Price Threshold
market_dynamics.description: At 500-2,000 orders/month, per-order costs ($3-5 + markup) make self-fulfillment cheaper.
market_dynamics.opportunity: These brands need space + tools. Co-warehouses sell space; WMS vendors sell software; shipping platforms sell labels.

market_dynamics.title: Multi-Channel Complexity
market_dynamics.direction: Single-channel → Flexible space or better tools
market_dynamics.description: Brands on Shopify + Amazon + TikTok Shop + wholesale need to prep differently for each channel.
market_dynamics.opportunity: Growing rapidly as social commerce expands. Any provider that simplifies multi-channel fulfillment wins.

lead_channels.name: Shopify App Store
lead_channels.description: 1-2 star reviews on competitor apps. Real Shopify merchants naming specific frustrations.

lead_channels.name: Trustpilot
lead_channels.description: ShipBob (3.8/5, 963 reviews, 17% 1-star), ShipMonk (20% 1-star). Detailed complaint narratives.

lead_channels.name: G2 / Capterra
lead_channels.description: Verified business user reviews with company size and industry data. Good for targeting.

lead_channels.name: BBB Complaints
lead_channels.description: Formal complaints indicate serious failures. Brands filing BBB complaints are ready to leave.

lead_channels.name: Reddit
lead_channels.description: r/ecommerce, r/FulfillmentByAmazon, r/shopify. Direct purchase-intent signals.

lead_channels.name: Amazon Seller Forums
lead_channels.description: FBA prep changes, fulfillment alternatives, warehouse recommendations. Not yet tracked.

lead_channels.name: Google Maps Reviews
lead_channels.description: Reviews of fulfillment centers and warehouses in target markets.
